name: Vroozi Purchase Management Platform API
what_it_does: Purchase management and accounts payable automation platform with REST API — enabling mid-market enterprises to digitize procurement workflows from purchase requests through invoice processing, with ERP integration (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite), mobile-first approval workflows, vendor management, and spend analytics.
use_cases: Integrating Vroozi purchase orders with ERP systems (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite) via API for financial data sync
Automating purchase request and approval workflows via Vroozi API for procurement digitization
Processing vendor invoices and automating 3-way matching via Vroozi AP automation API
Querying spend analytics and procurement KPIs via Vroozi API for finance dashboards
Managing vendor catalog and contracts via Vroozi API for supplier data governance
not_for: Complex strategic sourcing and RFx management (use Jaggaer or GEP SMART for complex sourcing)
Small business purchasing (Vroozi targets mid-market and enterprise companies)
Consumer purchasing (Vroozi is enterprise B2B procurement only)
best_when: A mid-market company (500-5,000 employees) needs to digitize paper-based procurement and accounts payable with ERP integration — replacing email approval chains and manual invoice processing with an automated, mobile-friendly system.
avoid_when: You're a small business, have simple purchasing needs, already have SAP Ariba or Coupa, or need advanced strategic sourcing capabilities.

auth.notes: OAuth2 client credentials flow for system integrations. API key for simpler integrations. Bearer token auth. Organization-scoped with role-based access controls. Webhook for procurement workflow events (PO creation, approval, invoice processing). REST API for procurement workflow automation. SAP, Oracle, NetSuite certified integrations. No fine-grained scopes beyond role level.

pricing.notes: Los Angeles company. Founded 2013. Raised $12M in funding. Backed by US Venture Partners. Targets mid-market (not Fortune 500 which GEP/Coupa/SAP Ariba dominate). Mobile-first design differentiator — strong iOS and Android apps. SAP Silver Partner — SAP ERP integration is strong. Gartner recognized. 500+ enterprise clients. AI-powered invoice data extraction (OCR + ML). Spanish language support for Latin America market. SaaS with strong customer success model.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for procurement and AP automation. OAuth2 + API key auth. Moderate documentation. Webhook for workflow events. ERP integration via certified connectors (SAP, Oracle, NetSuite). Implementation requires configuration before API integration is meaningful. Rate limits not documented publicly. Mid-market focus means less complex implementation than enterprise alternatives.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Procurement data reads fully idempotent. PO reads idempotent. Invoice reads idempotent. PO creation requires external ID for idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: Annual contract required — no monthly option for mid-market procurement software
Implementation configuration needed before API integration is production-ready
US data residency only — EU companies need to verify compliance requirements
Rate limits not documented — test before production integration
ERP integration (SAP, Oracle) requires additional configuration and testing

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. SOC2 compliant. US data residency. OAuth2 with role-based access. SAP Silver Partner with SAP security standards for integration. Procurement data is sensitive (pricing, vendor terms) — restrict API access to authorized integration accounts. Invoice data contains payment information — ensure AP workflow access is properly scoped.
